weekly_report: Weekly reports are due Friday at 5:00 PM unless program staff communicates an adjustment.
deliverables: Weekly deliverables are due Sunday at 11:59 PM and should reflect the work completed for the week.
office_hours: Check the current program schedule or ask program leadership for the latest office hours and support blocks.
housing: Housing-related questions should be directed to the Detroit Hacker House Director or designated house support contact.
contact: For general program support, contact program leadership in Discord or through the channel shared during onboarding.
fallback: I’m not sure about that yet. Try asking about weekly reports, deliverables, office hours, housing, or contact.
